final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: luxury commercial product photography, still life close-up
Primary request: macro close-up of a high-end Swiss tourbillon mechanical wristwatch laid flat on a dark carbon fiber surface, dial facing up
Scene/backdrop: dark carbon fiber textured surface, shallow depth of field with softly blurred background
Subject: top-tier Swiss watchmaking brand tourbillon wristwatch, approx. 42mm dial diameter; skeletonized open-worked dial revealing intricate movement including balance wheel, hairspring, gear train, and tourbillon mechanism; 18K rose gold case; diamond-set bezel with a full row of brilliant-cut diamonds; deep brown crocodile-grain leather strap
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, macro lens, jewelry-grade commercial photography
Composition/framing: top-down flat lay, macro lens, sharp focus precisely on the tourbillon mechanism, background bokeh
Lighting/mood: professional jewelry lighting setup, multi-angle softboxes ensuring even highlights on metal surfaces without overexposure, emphasizing the intricate mechanical details of the movement; refined and luxurious mood
Color palette: rose gold warm tones + cool diamond sparkle + deep charcoal carbon fiber + rich dark brown leather
Materials/textures: polished and brushed 18K rose gold case, brilliant diamond facets on bezel, open-worked skeletonized dial with visible gear train, deep brown crocodile-embossed leather strap, matte carbon fiber surface texture
Constraints: focus must remain on the tourbillon mechanism; dial must face up; all mechanical components (balance wheel, hairspring, gear train, tourbillon cage) must be clearly visible and sharp; color accuracy must be true-to-life
Avoid: overexposed metal highlights, blurry movement details, plastic-looking surfaces, artificial color cast
